Farming.title: Farming
Farming.description: A high proportion of the {faction_name} lands and people are invested in farming.

Mining.title: Mining
Mining.description: With an abundance of minerals or rare metals, {faction_name} devotes considerable resources to mining and processing.

Capitalist.title: Capitalist
Capitalist.description: Everything belongs to someone, and if there is demand for something, there's some money to be made.

Unassimilable.title: Patriotic
Unassimilable.description: Extremely patriotic to the cause. Unable to be taken in or absorbed.

Explorer.title: Explorer
Explorer.description: Innate curiosity and a boundless sense of adventure is common amongst the people of {faction_name}.

Rebellious.title: Rebellious
Rebellious.description: Rules are made to be broken, and here rules are broken well!

Psychotic.title: Psychotic
Psychotic.description: How is anyone supposed to know what is real and what is in your head? The people of {faction_name} certainly can't tell.

Obtruder.title: Obtruder
Obtruder.description: Continuously tries to force or impose their own ideas onto others.

Defiant.title: Defiant
Defiant.description: Unwilling to negotiate in trades or succumb to bribes.

Militar.title: Militar
Militar.description: The only way to ensure survival in a harsh universe is with a disciplined military.

Mechanical.title: Mechanical
Mechanical.description: {faction_name} has some of the best engineering minds in the universe.

Scientific.title: Scientific
Scientific.description: A robust and analytical way of thinking offers them a greater understanding of the galaxy around them.
